'''Macus Kayniph''' was a [[Near-Human]] member of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. At the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] final [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], he was one of the higher-ranking members of the organization, and in charge of their operations on [[Smarck]]. He was the first in Black Sun to notice, and try to act on, the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] posted on [[Kir Kanos]].

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], he first entered into a partnership with [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. He acquired expensive [[Spaarti cloning cylinder]]s and kidnapped [[Feena D'Asta]], giving both to Grappa in return for [[gree spice]] shipments (of which Grappa only supplied the first). Grappa later killed Kayniph when he objected to Grappa murdering a [[Zanibar]].
